name: Global Sweeteners Holdings Limited
summary: Global Sweeteners Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells corn refined products and corn sweeteners in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It operates in two segments: Corn Refined Products and Corn Sweeteners. The Corn Refined Products segment manufactures and sells corn starch, gluten meal, corn oil, and other corn refined products. The Corn Sweeteners segment manufactures and sells glucose, maltose, and high fructose corn syrups, as well as maltodextrin, a corn syrup solid. The company also offers general administration services. It serves customers in various sectors, such as food and beverage, confectionary, daily products, fermentation, and chemical industries, as well as cosmetics and pharmaceutical industries. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. Global Sweeteners Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Global Corn Bio-chem Technology Company Limited.
